policies.name: User Has MODEL_CREATE Right
policies.description: Check that user has access right to create models.

policies.name: User Has MODEL_UPDATE Right
policies.description: Check that user has access right to update models and matching role with provided model.

policies.name: User Has MODEL_READ Right
policies.description: Check that user has access right to read models and matching role with provided model.

policies.name: User Has MODEL_DELETE Right
policies.description: Check that user has access right to delete models and matching role with provided model.

policies.name: User has DOCUMENT_MULTI_DELETE Right
policies.description: Check that user has access right to multi delete documents.

policies.name: User Has DOCUMENT_CREATE Right
policies.description: Check that current user has access right to create documents.

policies.name: User Has DOCUMENT_UPDATE Right
policies.description: Check that current user has access right to update documents.

policies.name: User Has DOCUMENT_PARTIAL_UPDATE Right
policies.description: Check that current user has access right to partially update documents.

policies.name: User Has DOCUMENT_DELETE Right
policies.description: Check that current user has access right to delete documents.

policies.name: User Has Global Access To Manage Caches
policies.description: Check that current user has a role which has access right to manage caches.

policies.name: User Has Endpoint Access
policies.description: Overwrite to restrict access to endpoints

policies.name: User Has Relative Path Access
policies.description: Overwrite to restrict access to different URL paths

policies.name: User Has Attachment Upload Access
policies.description: Check that current user has access right to upload attachment.

policies.name: User Has Export List CDD Access
policies.description: Check that current user has access right to export list CDD.

policies.name: User Has The Permission To Execute Queries
policies.description: Check that current user has the permission to execute queries. #resource is the DocumentModel name

permissions.name: Model create permission
permissions.description: Check that the user has access right to create models. com.mgmtp.a12.model.header.Header is referenced as #resource.

permissions.name: Model update permission
permissions.description: Check that the user has access right to update provided model. com.mgmtp.a12.model.header.Header is referenced as #resource.

permissions.name: Model read permission
permissions.description: Check that the user has access right to read provided model. com.mgmtp.a12.model.header.Header is referenced as #resource.

permissions.name: Model delete permission
permissions.description: Check that the user has access right to delete provided model. com.mgmtp.a12.model.header.Header is referenced as #resource.

permissions.name: Document Create Permission
permissions.description: Check that the user has access right to create documents. com.mgmtp.a12.kernel.md.document.apiV2.immutable.DocumentV2 is referenced as #resource.

permissions.name: Document Update Permission
permissions.description: Check that the user has access right to update documents. com.mgmtp.a12.dataservices.authorization.DocumentUpdateResource is referenced as #resource.

permissions.name: Document Partial Update Permission
permissions.description: Check that the user has access right to partially update documents. com.mgmtp.a12.dataservices.authorization.DocumentUpdateResource is referenced as #resource.

permissions.name: Document Delete Permission
permissions.description: Check that the user has access right to delete documents. com.mgmtp.a12.dataservices.document.DataServicesDocument is referenced as #resource.

permissions.name: Document Multi Delete Permission
permissions.description: Check that user has access right to multi delete documents.

permissions.name: Manage Caches
permissions.description: Check that the user has a role which has access right to manage caches.
policy-refs: User Has Global Access To Manage Caches

permissions.name: Define access to endpoints
permissions.description: You can control endpoint security inside this scope. Each endpoint is defined by its class name/method name. Returns always true.

permissions.name: Actuator Permission
permissions.description: You can control actuator security by a relative URL. Default is: Allow all.

permissions.name: Check uploaded attachment
permissions.description: You can define permission rules for uploading a file. com.mgmtp.a12.dataservices.attachment.AttachmentHeader is referenced as #resource.

permissions.name: Check export document
permissions.description: You can define permission rules for export document.
policy-refs: User Has Export List CDD Access

permissions.name: Check query
permissions.description: You can define permission rules for executing queries.
policy-refs: User Has The Permission To Execute Queries
